dish_name: Teriyaki Asian Noodles with Tofu and Stir-Fried Vegetables
description: Teriyaki Asian noodles with tofu and stir-fried vegetables tastes just as great as take-out. Use your favorite noodles like soba, udon, spaghetti, or linguini. The recipe includes a simple teriyaki marinade and stir-fried vegetables.
ingredients: [{"name": "red bell pepper", "unit": "medium", "amount": "1"}, {"name": "mushrooms", "unit": "ounces", "amount": "6"}, {"name": "scallions", "unit": "pieces", "amount": "2 to 3"}, {"name": "Chinese wheat noodles, udon, spaghetti, or linguini", "unit": "ounces", "amount": "8"}, {"name": "extra-firm tofu", "unit": "ounce tub", "amount": "14"}, {"name": "high-heat oil, like safflower", "unit": "tablespoons", "amount": "1 1/2"}, {"name": "bottled teriyaki marinade", "unit": "cup", "amount": "1/4"}, {"name": "grated fresh or bottled ginger", "unit": "teaspoons", "amount": "2"}, {"name": "Freshly ground pepper", "unit": null, "amount": "to taste"}, {"name": "Sesame seeds or chopped toasted peanuts or cashews", "unit": null, "amount": "optional"}, {"name": "Sriracha or other hot seasoning", "unit": null, "amount": "optional"}]
instructions: Prepare the vegetables as directed (bell pepper through scallions) and set aside. Cook the noodles according to package directions until al dente, then drain. Cut the tofu into 6 slabs crosswise and blot very well with clean tea towels or paper towels. Cut into dice. Heat the oil in a stir-fry pan. Add the tofu and stir-fry over medium-high heat, stirring often, until golden on most sides, 5 to 8 minutes. Add the bell pepper and mushrooms. Stir-fry for 2 to 3 minutes longer, just until the vegetables are tender-crisp. Stir in the scallions. Once the noodles are done and drained, add them to the pan along with the teriyaki sauce, ginger, and pepper. Stir-fry just until everything is well blended and piping hot. Add more teriyaki marinade to taste, if desired. Sprinkle some sesame seeds or nuts over the top of the dish, if using, or pass them around. Serve at once straight from the pan, passing around hot seasoning for spicing up individual servings.
notes: Feel free to add other vegetables such as fresh or frozen broccoli florets and/or green beans in step 5. The teriyaki marinade recipe is provided and can be made from scratch or bottled sauce can be used.
tags: Asian, noodles, tofu, stir-fry, vegan, teriyaki
